no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The requested queue command surface and sparse queue-rank behavior are already present in this worktree. `cli/cmd/bead_queue.go` wires `ddx bead queue` with `top`, `move`, and `clear`, and `cli/internal/bead/queue.go` implements queue-rank persistence, same-priority enforcement, and renormalization. The targeted tests passed, so there is no code change to apply in this attempt.
verification_command: cd cli && go test ./cmd/... -run "TestBeadQueue" -count=1 && go test ./cmd/... ./internal/bead/... && cd .. && lefthook run pre-commit
